name: cargo deck area basis
citation: SOLAS FSS Code (Res. MSC.98(73) as amended (2015 consolidated edition)) Ch. 14 (fixed deck foam systems), para. 2.2.2.1 — 0.6 L/min per m2 of cargo tanks deck area. Duration basis: at least 20 min of foam generation for tankers fitted with an inert gas installation (30 min when not fitted), same chapter.

name: largest tank sectional area basis
citation: SOLAS FSS Code (Res. MSC.98(73) as amended (2015 consolidated edition)) Ch. 14 (fixed deck foam systems), para. 2.2.2.2 — 6 L/min per m2 of the horizontal sectional area of the single largest cargo tank. Duration basis: at least 20 min of foam generation for tankers fitted with an inert gas installation (30 min when not fitted), same chapter.

name: largest monitor protected area basis
citation: SOLAS FSS Code (Res. MSC.98(73) as amended (2015 consolidated edition)) Ch. 14 (fixed deck foam systems), para. 2.2.2.3 — 3 L/min per m2 of the area protected by the largest monitor, with a minimum monitor capacity of 1250 L/min. Duration basis: at least 20 min of foam generation for tankers fitted with an inert gas installation (30 min when not fitted), same chapter.
